headings: h2: If you are a constituent of Birmingham Ladywood…
text_excerpt: Contact - Shabana Mahmood Skip to main content Shabana Mahmood Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood Tiktok Facebook Donate News In Parliament Advice Centres Contact More Menu Contact Standing up for Birmingham Ladywood. 💡 I maintain an office to serve my constituents as the Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood. My constituency team do not deal with enquiries relating to my role as Home Secretary. Visit the Home Office website for contact details . If you are a constituent of Birmingham Ladywood… Most cases can be solved quickly over email. If your issue is urgent, please get in touch using the information below. Phone: 0121 661 9440 Email: [email protected] Write: Office of Shabana Mahmood MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Shabana Mahmood Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by the West Midlands Labour Party on behalf of Shabana Mahmood all at 1Unit 4302, Waterside Centre, B37 7YN. ©2026 Copyright Shabana Mahmood MP all rights reserved.
